description: A customer logs into their account to cancel their monthly subscription box.

nodes.task_description: Log into their online account and navigate to the 'Manage Subscription' page.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer finds their active subscription details.

nodes.task_description: Select the 'Cancel Subscription' option and provide a reason for cancellation.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer chooses to cancel and provides feedback.

nodes.task_description: Receive an on-screen confirmation and an email confirming the subscription has been cancelled.

expected_outcome.expected: The subscription is successfully cancelled, and the customer is notified.
